summary: Backend: 24/24 pytest passed. Frontend: login (demo + manual), home dashboard (hero, offers, categories, featured), product detail, add-to-cart (cart badge updates to 1), and tab navigation (Home/Products/Warranty/Orders/Profile) verified visually. End-to-end checkout->order->warranty flow could not be fully driven via Playwright because the in-app cart icon and checkout button are TouchableOpacity without testIDs (no anchor element/role), and any page.goto reload empties the in-memory cart. Backend checkout flow itself is verified by API tests creating an order and the warranty appearing in /api/warranties.

integration_issues.issue: CartContext keeps items only in useState; not persisted to AsyncStorage, so a page refresh / deep-link to /cart empties the cart and the user loses items. On native this also means killing the app loses cart. Recommend persisting to AsyncStorage.

issues: Tab label is 'Products' but the review request referenced it as 'Catalog'. Either is fine, but mention for consistency.
Console warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated, Image style.resizeMode deprecated, async-storage version mismatch (3.0.2 installed vs Expo expected 2.2.0). Cosmetic but worth fixing.

react_native_issues.component: Header cart icon, Add-to-Cart, Buy Now, Place Order, bottom tab buttons, product cards, offer cards, category chips, login form fields
react_native_issues.issue: Missing testID props on all interactive elements. Makes Playwright/Detox testing brittle (had to rely on text + coordinates). Add data-testid to: cart-icon, add-to-cart-btn, buy-now-btn, place-order-btn, tab-home/products/warranty/orders/profile, product-card-{id}, login-email, login-password, login-submit, demo-login, signup-link.

action_items: Persist CartContext to AsyncStorage so cart survives reload/relaunch.
Add testID props to all interactive components (TouchableOpacity, TextInput, cart icon, tab buttons, product cards, place-order, add-to-cart, buy-now).
Resolve deprecation warnings: replace shadow* props with boxShadow, use props.resizeMode on Image, align @react-native-async-storage/async-storage to 2.2.0 per Expo.
Optional: rename Products tab to Catalog if you want naming alignment with PRD.
critical_code_review_comments: JWT_SECRET committed in /app/backend/.env - acceptable for dev but rotate before any prod use.
CORS allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=False is fine here (no cookies). OK.
seed_demo_customer only seeds when user does not exist; if dev recreates orders separately ramesh's order count could drift, but acceptable.
warranty percent_remaining computation: days_total = warranty_months*30 days; small inaccuracy vs calendar months but acceptable.
server.py is 470 lines with all routes/seeders inline - splittable into routers/seed modules for maintainability.

success_rate.frontend: Login, home, product detail, add-to-cart confirmed. Checkout->Place Order not driven via automation due to missing testIDs; backend POST /api/orders/checkout verified directly.

seed_data_creation: Used seeded customer ramesh@farm.com (3 warranty records confirmed via API). Tests create TEST_ prefixed users/tickets/orders; not cleaned up but isolated by prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API at https://farm-gear-hub-4.preview.emergentagent.com/api works fully. To drive UI checkout flow, main agent should add testIDs (cart-icon, add-to-cart-btn, place-order-btn, login-* etc) and persist cart in AsyncStorage. After that, run /app/backend/tests/test_rkai_api.py and a Playwright script that taps via [data-testid].
rca_of_issue: Cart appears empty on /cart deep-link because CartContext stores items in useState only (no AsyncStorage). Repro: login -> tap product -> Add to Cart (badge becomes 1) -> hit browser refresh or open /cart in new tab -> Cart (0). Mitigation: wrap setItems with AsyncStorage.setItem('rkai_cart', JSON.stringify(items)) on change and hydrate on mount.
